science.title: Science
science.direction: Observation, instruments, experiment, and measured uncertainty.

nature.title: Nature
nature.direction: Ecosystems, flows, branching systems, and living cycles.

creativity.title: Creativity
creativity.direction: Layered composition, sketch marks, and expressive assembly.

engineering.title: Engineering
engineering.direction: Blueprint language, construction, load paths, and mechanical precision.

mathematics.title: Mathematics
mathematics.direction: Elegant abstraction, symmetry, proof, and curves.

society-mind.title: Society & Mind
society-mind.direction: Conversation, networks, relationships, and shifting perspective.

echo-chamber.caption: A thought rebounds between mirrored walls until the strongest echoes remain.

signal-detection.caption: A weak pattern rises through noise as a threshold line separates notice from miss.

pattern-garden.caption: Repeated forms grow into a larger arrangement, like a garden built from simple rules.

memory-sequence.caption: A short sequence appears, fades, and asks the mind to rebuild order from fragments.

perspective-shift.caption: The same structure is framed from two positions, changing what feels central.

dueling-accounts.caption: Two archival accounts describe one event from different angles and with different omissions.

unlabeled.caption: Artifacts sit without labels, asking the viewer to infer category and context.

chronology.caption: Events line up on a timeline where order changes interpretation.

chain-reaction.caption: A linked sequence of causes shows how one event pushes the next into motion.

witness-accounts.caption: Several witnesses circle a shared incident, each preserving only part of the scene.

controlled.caption: A controlled comparison holds one condition steady so a single difference can be tested.

hypothesis.caption: A prediction branches forward from an idea and meets observation on the other side.

scale.caption: Nested frames reveal how the same object looks different across magnitudes.

signal-in-data.caption: Scattered points begin to align as a meaningful pattern emerges from variation.

uncertainty.caption: A measured result is surrounded by a range that widens as certainty falls away.

ecosystem.caption: Species connect through a food web where each removal shifts the whole system.

symbiosis.caption: Two living forms interlock, each changing shape because of the other.

seasons.caption: One landscape cycles through a year as light, growth, and water turn together.

watershed.caption: Streams gather from ridge to river mouth, carrying every upstream decision downstream.

adaptation.caption: Variation meets pressure and only some forms fit the changed conditions.

compose.caption: Separate fragments become a unified arrangement through balance, rhythm, and placement.

constraint.caption: A limited frame creates pressure that shapes new possibilities inside the boundary.

diverge.caption: One prompt splits into many paths as options spread outward from a shared start.

iterate.caption: Each pass leaves a trace and nudges the work toward a stronger form.

remix.caption: Existing parts are cut apart and recombined into a new composition.

bridge-builder.caption: A span carries load by distributing force through supports and joints.

failure-analysis.caption: A breakdown is traced backward through the points where stress overcame design.

trade-offs.caption: Improving one quality shifts weight away from another, so choices must be balanced.

optimization.caption: A path moves across constraints toward a better solution without ever being perfect.

feedback-loop.caption: Output returns to the system as information, changing the next adjustment.

patterns.caption: A repeating structure reveals order that can be extended, transformed, and predicted.

symmetry.caption: A form reflects across an axis and keeps its balance under transformation.

proof.caption: Statements connect step by step until a conclusion becomes unavoidable.

probability.caption: Many outcomes scatter across a field while expected tendencies become visible over time.

estimation.caption: A rough measure brackets the unknown before precision arrives.

attention.caption: A spotlight of focus brightens one target while nearby changes fall into the margins.

bias.caption: A tilted filter weights some evidence more heavily than the rest.

cooperation.caption: Separate participants connect around a shared structure that none can complete alone.

memory.caption: A recollection is rebuilt from layered traces, not retrieved as a perfect recording.

decision-making.caption: Choices branch into consequences, each path carrying different risks and rewards.
